## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive on the Witness.ai platform for content strategy development.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Repositioning:** Shift from "AI Governance" to "AI Risk Management." The former is vague and commoditized; the latter frames the platform as a solution for specific, tangible risks (brand, legal, IP) that resonate with a broader C-suite audience.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
  - [**Core Differentiator: Intent Detection:** The platform analyzes user intent, not just keywords, to enable nuanced policy enforcement. This is critical for catching subtle risks, like an employee summarizing sensitive "drug research" without using keywords like "confidential."](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [**Unified Platform for Three Use Cases:** The platform provides a single pane of glass for three distinct needs: employee governance, model protection, and agentic security.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [**Key Technical Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
      - [**Bidirectional Visibility:** Analyzes both user prompts and model responses for complete context.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
      - [**In-App Protection:** Secures AI use directly within productivity tools (e.g., MS Word), not just in-browser.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
      - [**High-Efficacy Model Protection:** Achieves 99.3% true positive detection of advanced attacks like prompt injections, a key competitive advantage.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Fragmented AI Risk

  - [**Market Gap:** CISOs and Chief Risk Officers need a holistic solution for AI risk, but the market offers only fragmented tools.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Witness.ai's Solution:** A unified platform for three core use cases:](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
    1.  [**Employee Governance:** Securing employee use of AI tools.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
    2.  [**Model Protection:** Defending proprietary AI models from attacks.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
    3.  [**Agentic Security:** Securing AI agents and their interactions with tools (MCP servers).](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)

### The Solution: Observe, Control, Protect

  - [**Observe (Visibility):**](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Shadow AI Discovery:** Identifies unapproved AI apps used by employees.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [**Bidirectional Conversation Analysis:** Analyzes both prompts and responses for full context, enabling policy enforcement on both ends.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
      - [**Agent Discovery:** Maps the agent ecosystem, including teams, types, and MCP server access.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [**Control (Policy & Intent):**](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
      - [**Intent-Based Policies:** Moves beyond rigid keyword rules to understand user intent.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
          - [**Example:** An employee summarizes "drug research" for an unapproved tool. The platform detects the intent and blocks the action, preventing a multi-billion dollar IP loss.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [**Granular Policy Actions:** Provides more than a simple "allow/block" choice.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
          - [**Options:** `Allow`, `Warn`, `Block`, `Route` (to an approved internal model).](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)
  - [**Protect (Guardrails & Efficacy):**](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
      - [**Data Protection:** Redacts sensitive info (e.g., SSNs) from prompts before they reach the model, then rehydrates it into the response. This secures data without blocking productivity.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
      - [**Model Protection:** Defends against prompt injections and jailbreaks.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
          - [**Efficacy:** 99.3% true positive detection, validated in customer environments and benchmarked as superior to competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
      - [**Model Identity Protection:** Enforces a model's defined purpose (e.g., an airline chatbot can only discuss travel, not politics).](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)

### Strategic Repositioning: From "Governance" to "Risk Management"

  - [**Problem with "Governance":** The term is vague and often associated with narrow concepts like ethical bias, failing to capture the platform's broad value.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=2586.0)
  - [**Solution: "AI Risk Management":** This frames the platform as a solution for specific, tangible risks that resonate with a broader C-suite audience (Legal, Marketing, HR), not just security.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=2293.0)
      - [**Risk Categories:** Brand, legal, IP, security, employee.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=2702.0)
      - [**Market Validation:** This language was used by BlackRock's AI Steering Committee, which includes stakeholders from Legal, HR, and Marketing, confirming its resonance with real-world buyers.](https://fathom.video/share/iGmF-c6DQ4FpXsAc9CV3puVcbYQsX8xF?tab=summary&timestamp=2449.0)
